chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-2148 of 2024 Constitution Petition No.D-2149 of 2024 Constitution Petition No.D-2150 of 2024 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection at flag-A. 2. For hearing of CMA No.7885/2024 (Ex/A) 3. For hearing of main case. 21.01.2026 Mr. Shafqat Raheem Rajput, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ghulam Abass Akhtar, Advocate for respondents-Pakistan Railways. Mr. Naveed Ahmed Shah D.A.G..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- After arguing this petition all the learned counsels agree on the disposal of the petitions in the following terms:- i. Since the period of license of the subject shops has expired, the railways is free to conduct a fresh auction of licensed rights of the subject shops upon fresh terms and conditions. ii. The petitioners who are the previous license holders of the said shops will have first right of refusal in the said open auction”. Petition is disposed of in the above terms. Office to place signed copy of this order in captioned connected matters. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
